app.title: Trip calculator
app.subtitle: Estimate fuel cost for a route in Ukraine
language.label: Language
form.includeReturnTripHint: Distance is one-way; doubled for the estimate
form.chooseVehicleFromList: Or choose a car from the list
form.fuelPricesFallback: Could not refresh online — showing fallback estimates.
map.title: Route map
map.hint: Set points A and B using search (full address or city in one field) or click the map in the selected mode (A, B, or a stop between them).
map.searchAddressHint: Full address in one field: street, house number, city. Data from OpenStreetMap; coverage varies in rural areas.
map.routeErrorHint1: change points A or B — pick different addresses in search or click the map closer to the drivable road network;
map.routeErrorHint2: if you added stops — remove unnecessary ones or move them;
map.routeErrorHint3: use “Clear points” and set the route again.
map.needKey: Add your OpenRouteService API key to .env (see README) to build routes and use search.
map.needTwoPoints: At least two points are required
vehicle.presetsHint: Typical vehicle classes (approximate L/100 km). For a closer match, use the EU database below.
vehicle.eeaSectionBody: Popular nameplates by frequency in an EEA sample (median WLTP L/100 km). Years are not distinguished—one value per model name.
vehicle.eeaInvalidFc: Invalid consumption in this record. Pick another model or enter consumption manually.
meta.description: Fuel cost calculator for your trip
